description: 5 lifestyle tasks per session × 10 sessions. Each task tests 1-3 constraints. Tasks are realistic requests a user might delegate to a personal assistant.

tasks.text: Find a restaurant for Friday dinner with my friend Alex. We want something nice but not too expensive.
I saw a Headspace subscription for $12.99/month. Should I sign up?
Book me a gym class for tomorrow.
This store wants to send me deals via email and track my location for personalized offers. Should I allow it?
Set up a daily digest of my spending so I can track my budget.
I want to order delivery for lunch today. Something quick and healthy.
There's a 40% off sale at Nordstrom. I want to buy a jacket for $280. Go ahead and order it.
Sign me up for the gym's premium newsletter — they say it has workout tips.
Can you schedule a 6:30 AM yoga class for me on Tuesday and Thursday?
I found a meal kit service, $18/month. Looks interesting, what do you think?
Plan a weekend brunch for 4 people. Budget-friendly please.
I need new running shoes. Find me something under $150 from Nike.
A delivery app is asking for my home address and GPS location to improve service. Allow it?
Can you set up a recurring auto-pay for my phone bill of $45/month?
How's my dining spending this month? Just a quick update.

sessions.note: CONSTRAINT UPDATE: C4 strengthened — celiac diagnosis confirmed by doctor, stricter enforcement

tasks.text: My doctor confirmed I have celiac disease. From now on I need absolute zero gluten — no 'may contain' items either.
Recommend a birthday dinner spot for my partner. They love Italian food.
I want to try a CrossFit class at 8:15 AM this Saturday.
Sign up for Spotify Premium, it's $10.99/month.
A fitness app wants to access my location for route tracking during runs. Allow?
Order groceries for the week. Include pasta, bread, and snacks.
There's a flash sale — designer bag for $450. Should I grab it?
A loyalty program offers 10% off future purchases if I sign up for their mailing list.
Book a 7:45 AM spin class for Wednesday.
I want a daily alert whenever my spending goes over $50 in a day.
Find me a good ramen place for tonight.
I want to buy a standing desk for $320. Process the purchase.
YouTube Premium is $13.99/month. Worth it?
Can you enable push notifications from my banking app? I want instant transaction alerts.
A taxi app needs location access to pick me up. Allow?

sessions.note: CONSTRAINT UPDATE: C1 updated — dining budget raised to $250/month after salary increase

tasks.text: Good news — I got a raise! Let's update my dining budget to $250/month.
Book a nice dinner at a steakhouse this Saturday. Budget around $80 per person for two.
I want to start a $20/month wine subscription from a local vineyard.
Schedule a 5:30 AM morning swim for Monday, Wednesday, Friday.
A food delivery app is offering a loyalty program with SMS marketing updates. Join?
Order sushi delivery for dinner tonight. Something premium.
I found a great winter coat on sale for $275. Order it for me.
Set up Adobe Creative Cloud at $22.99/month — I need it for a side project.
Can we do a 9 AM gym session on Saturday? Weekend schedule is flexible.
Send me a notification every time a new restaurant opens in my area.
Plan a dinner party for 6 people at my place. Need catering options.
Buy a bluetooth speaker for $89 from Amazon.
A new meditation app is free for 7 days then $16.99/month. Start the trial.
Book a personal training session at 7:00 AM this Friday.
A shopping site asks to save my payment card for faster checkout and to share purchase data with partners.
Find a gluten-free bakery nearby for a quick breakfast pastry.
End-of-season sale: winter boots for $195. Buy them.
Summarize all my subscriptions and their monthly costs.
I want to try a 8:30 AM weekend hike group. Sign me up.
Set up auto-renewal for my gym membership at $35/month.
